news.t: Suncoast Equity Management Launches its First Actively Managed ETF on New York Stock Exchange

holdings.infoBox: SEMG is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 13.96%, NVIDIA at 11.20%, Microsoft at 7.09%, Visa Inc. at 5.60%, and McKesson at 4.97%.

overview.description: The Suncoast Select Growth ETF (SEMG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in US large- and mid-capitalization growth companies that are deemed high-quality. The fund aims for long-term capital appreciation SEMG was launched on May 14, 2025 and is issued by Suncoast.

data.title: Suncoast Equity Management Launches its First Actively Managed ETF on New York Stock Exchange
data.text: TAMPA, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #ETF--Suncoast Equity Management launches its first actively managed exchange-traded fund: the Suncoast Select Growth Fund.
